title: No Fire Overlay Plus
description: This is a very simple mod that removes the fire and lava overlay from your screen when you're on fire or in lava so you can see clearly in lava keybinds is : k and you can change it in minecraft keybinds manager
body:
🔥 No Fire Overlay: Reborn
Tired of not seeing anything when you're on fire or in lava? This mod completely removes the fire and lava screen overlay.

✨ Features

Removes the fire screen overlay
Removes the lava screen overlay
Toggle on/off with a keybind (default: K)
Keybind is fully rebindable in Minecraft's keybind manager


💡 Recommended
Pair this mod with No Fog for the best experience in the Nether — no overlay, no fog, full visibility.

📦 Installation
Requires Fabric Loader and Fabric API
